title: Model
description: Provider-agnostic facts about a model. One file per model at data/models/<id>.json. These are properties of the model itself — capability and architecture facts that do not change depending on who serves it.

id.description: Canonical slug for this model, referenced by providers/*.json as model_id. Must match the filename (data/models/<id>.json).

lab.description: 组织/实验室 slug, 对应 data/providers/<lab>.json 中的 id, 表示该模型的创造者.

release_date.description: First public release date of this model (YYYY-MM-DD), independent of any provider.

open_weights.description: 权重开放: true = 开源, false = 闭源.

tool_call.description: 支持 Function Calling / 工具调用.

reasoning.description: 内置思考 (extended thinking), e.g. DeepSeek-R1, QwQ.

limit.description: 上下文长度 / 最大输出长度 (单位: token). Providers may only offer a lower limit than the model supports — that goes in providers/*.json as an override, not here.
